name: MGM Resorts International
summary: MGM Resorts International is a global gaming and entertainment company operating 16 domestic casino properties and two casino resorts in Macau through MGM China (56% interest). The company offers casino gaming, hotels, food and beverage, entertainment, meetings/conferences, and retail. It also operates online gaming through LeoVegas (international) and holds a 50% interest in BetMGM for U.S. online sports betting and iGaming.
